description: The automatic processing system has detected the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake but failed to determine the first motion polarities for the P-wave arrivals. Assign the following First Motion Polarities to the P-wave picks for the event: GE.TOLI (Compression), GE.GSI (Compression), GE.SANI (Dilatation), and GE.BKB (Compression). Ensure the updated origin with these polarities is committed to the database.
